title: Mexican Chicken Tacos
description: A flavorful and spicy Mexican dish made with chicken, peppers, and spices. Serve with warm tortillas and your favorite toppings.

ingredients.name: optional toppings
ingredients.notes: diced onion, diced tomato, diced avocado, cilantro

instructions: Season the chicken with cumin, chili powder, and salt.
Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, grill the sausage for 3-5 minutes per side, or until browned.
Warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Slice the cooked chicken and sausage into thin strips.
Assemble tacos by placing chicken and sausage onto tortillas, and topping with cheese, sour cream, and desired toppings.
